name: com.playermadegames.pooling
description: A drop-in replacement for Instantiate/Destroy with automatic object pooling. Built on Unity's UnityEngine.Pool.ObjectPool<T>, organized for hierarchy cleanliness, with lifecycle hooks for poolable behavior. Works with or without a manager component in scene (lazy bootstrap).

samples.description: Demonstrates the full lifecycle of a pooled object: spawn, behavior, auto-return after delay.
